nasb.text: who devour widows’ houses, and for appearance’s sake offer long prayers; these will receive greater condemnation.”

esv.text: who devour widows’ houses and for a pretense make long prayers. They will receive the greater condemnation.”

cnv.text: 他們吞沒了寡婦的房產，又假裝作冗長的禱告。這些人必受更重的刑罰。”

ccb.text: 他们侵吞寡妇的财产，还假意做冗长的祷告。这种人必受到更严厉的惩罚。”

csbs.text: 他们侵吞寡妇的家产，又假意做很长的祷告。这些人将受到更重的惩罚。”
